creator: anindya49@hotmail.com
text:
The port deskutils/simpleagenda-0.43_4 does not build under 10.2-RELEASE-p3. Here is my uname -a:
FreeBSD wopr 10.2-RELEASE FreeBSD 10.2-RELEASE #0 r286666: Wed Aug 12 15:26:37 UTC 2015     root@releng1.nyi.freebsd.org:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

There is a more detailed description of the problem, and a possible solution in the following thread:
https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/upgrade-for-port-deskutils-simpleagenda-fails.53300/

Thank you for looking into this!

Anindya
